affiliations: National Association of Landscape Professionals (NALP) — Member since 2020
Denton County Contractors Association — Member since 2019
Texas Nursery & Landscape Association (TNLA) — Member since 2021
certifications: EPA Section 608 Universal Certification (refrigerant handling for chiller units)

personnel.name: Marcus Bellweather
personnel.bio: Marcus founded Nimbus Ground Effects in 2019 after 12 years in commercial HVAC and theatrical fog system engineering. He designed fog and atmospheric effects systems for three Six Flags properties and two permanent installations at the Dallas Arboretum before launching Nimbus to bring ground-level fog technology to residential and boutique commercial applications.
credentials: Texas Class B HVAC Technician License — Active
Low Voltage Licensing Exemption (Texas) — landscape lighting systems under 25V
personnel.specialization: System design, chiller calibration, and multi-zone control architecture

personnel.name: Danny Reeves
personnel.bio: Danny joined Nimbus in 2021 with 8 years of experience in irrigation system installation and landscape construction. He leads all field installation crews and manages the trenching, manifold, and commissioning process.
credentials: Nimbus Internal Certification: Manifold Systems Level 2
personnel.specialization: Manifold installation, trenching, nozzle calibration, and field commissioning

personnel.name: Priya Chandrasekaran
personnel.bio: Priya handles all smart home integration, Wi-Fi configuration, app setup, and weather automation programming for Premium system installations. She joined Nimbus in 2023 after working in home automation and low-voltage systems.
credentials: Nimbus Internal Certification: Smart Fog Controller Programming
personnel.specialization: Control systems, smart home integration, weather automation, LED lighting programming

completed_installations.service_area_note: All installations within the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex, including Denton, Collin, Tarrant, Dallas, and western Kaufman counties
